subject: Re:
body:
I agree
Maybe then just stick to Sept 18th meeting - polite and courteous -
I will be respectful and deferential.
On the advice of Leonard I'm removing all criticism of scientists from the book
A production company in LA - connected to my son - is doing a documentary film on the new book .
They are looking for critics
I will film part of it as a lecture Al Gore " Inconvenient Truth " style in Nantucket .
I sent you the poster.
Can send it again by text
They would welcome his criticism
I think we should wait to discuss until Sept 18th unless you suggest we invite him on Sept 23 to Nantucket ?
I'm thinking what I should do with the Autumn of my life.
Will get clarity during silence .
The energy of pleasure has exhausted itself in me as also the energy that goes into " being right "
I'm ready to serve In a meaningful way
Love

Deepak Chopra
███████████████████████

[*Super Genes: Unlock the Astonishing Power of Your DNA for Optimum Health and Wellbeing*](<>)

subject: Re:
body: i ll be any help i can, we are all of the same generation, it is silly to argue with hubris

subject: Re:
body:
I just landed in NY
I'm staring a new phase in my life visa vis my relationship with my critics
2 scientific papers on my work will be out soon
Leonard read the new book and made some corrections so now 3 physicists have made sure that the science is accurate
If you haven't sent the book to him please hold off so he gets a corrected copy.
I'm going to get off my high horse ( the tiger I can't ) and try and start a dialogue with anyone who is willing .
I will do as you guide me
I'm going this afternoon to NJ to do a fundraiser for an orphanage and then to Boston until Monday afternoon
Meeting Barnaby on Monday afternoon
Tuesday I'm doing an event in NY with Eric Schadt to announce new meditation research
Go for silence on Aug 28 th
Love

Deepak Chopra
███████████████████████

[*Super Genes: Unlock the Astonishing Power of Your DNA for Optimum Health and Wellbeing*](<>)
